objective: Add Target::McpLlm to grove init --as, wiring explore-mode .mcp.json (serve --explore), idempotent CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md sentinel blocks, non-TTY guard, and first-run TUI delegation.
key_changes: Target::McpLlm variant added to cli/src/init.rs with full doc-comment
Non-TTY guard in run(): fails on non-terminal stdout only when explore.json absent + not dry-run
Dry-run path: McpLlm prints planned harness files BEFORE provisioned.is_empty() early-return
TUI launch: config_tui::run(root, None) called on first-run when explore.json absent
write_harness(): McpLlm early-return branch writes 3 files (.mcp.json, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md)
write_mcp_json_explore(): registers grove with args:["serve","--explore"] preserving other servers
claude_section(): McpLlm arm names mcp__grove__explore; fallback uses plain tool names (not mcp__grove__ prefix)
write_agents_md() + agents_section(): harness-neutral AGENTS.md with sentinel idempotency
7 new unit tests in cli/src/init.rs: all pass
3 new integration tests in cli/tests/cli.rs: dry-run shape, idempotency, AGENTS.md create/append
docs/setup.md: new Explore-mode section documenting first-run TUI, --dry-run, and file outputs
